ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the patient resides */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient was hospitalized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preexisting_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preexisting condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the preexisting condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preexisting condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was first diagnosed */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan for the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preexisting condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed in the patient */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  "reason_for_admission" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's admission */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status upon discharge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospitalization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospitalization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital where the doctor is affiliated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_doctor" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor treating the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the doctor started treating the patient */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the doctor stopped treating the patient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the patient-doctor relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication administration */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the medication */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient started taking the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient stopped taking the medication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
